title: Proofer: deploy the Release-Engineer advisor + run a full review -> accurate PathGraph (tracks)
perceive: Proofer (Release Engineer / Deployment Validator) north star = an ACCURATE PathGraph: the living record of what is ACTUALLY in this spoke (tracks), reconciled against aspiration. PathGraph spec: wilbur/docs/pathgraph-spec.md; artifact: WAI-Harness/spoke/local/pathgraph/ (history.jsonl). delivered != verified: the union of completed lugs/specs is the real production surface and must be proven still-real + still-working. Infra spoke: gate advisory.
execute: DEPLOY Proofer: scaffold advisors/proofer/ from canon (/home/mario/projects/wheelwright/mywheel/WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/proofer/contract.json) -> copy contract.json into this spoke's WAI-Harness/spoke/local/advisors/proofer/ (or WAI-Spoke/advisors/proofer/ on v3); register 'proofer' in this spoke's advisors/schedule-index.json (run_cadence daily, event_triggers [closeout,pre_distribution,push], priority 9, tool-backed).

BUILD ACCURATE PATHGRAPH (pillar 1): per wilbur/docs/pathgraph-spec.md, inventory what is ACTUALLY in this spoke (modules, tools, specs, capabilities, completed lugs) and reconcile vs aspiration; write/refresh WAI-Harness/spoke/local/pathgraph/ (append history.jsonl); surface each aspiration-vs-reality DRIFT as a PEV-complete gap lug.

PROVE RETENTION (pillar 2): run `python3 /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/mywheel/WAI-Harness/hub/local/scripts/wai_assurance.py --spoke .` (runs this spoke's tests + validators, writes the last_green ledger at WAI-Harness/spoke/local/runtime/assurance-ledger.json, flags was-green->now-red regressions). For any red/regression, open a PEV-complete fix lug.
CHECK RUNTIME (pillar 3, LOCAL/DEV only for now): reachability of the dev deployment (hub-registry dev hostname/port); record up/down advisory (no prod gate yet).
COMMIT scoped (advisor + pathgraph + ledger) to this spoke; push per normal lifecycle.
verify: advisors/proofer/contract.json present + 'proofer' registered in this spoke's schedule-index.json
WAI-Harness/spoke/local/pathgraph/ refreshed (history.jsonl appended) and its modules reflect ACTUAL code (spot-check 2-3)
assurance-ledger.json written with per-capability last_green; any red/regression has a fix lug
drift between aspiration and reality is captured as gap lugs (not silently dropped)
acceptance_criteria: Proofer advisor deployed + scheduled in this spoke
An accurate PathGraph exists for this spoke (reality-reconciled, drift surfaced)
Retention proof ran with a last_green ledger; regressions flagged
origin: mywheel s136 operator directive: deploy Proofer + full PathGraph review per active spoke (tonight AP)
